name: ash-secure-shop
description: Demo app showing @3maem/ash-node-sdk protecting a real e-commerce API

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate -w apps/api && npm run db:seed -w apps/api
